mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm ( alarm_no, vehicle_id, vehicle_plate, task_id, alarm_type, alarm_level, alarm_content, longitude, latitude, status, alarm_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{alarmNo}, #{vehicleId}, #{vehiclePlate}, #{taskId}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmLevel}, #{alarmContent}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{status}, #{alarmTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE alarm SET status = #{status}, handle_method = #{handleMethod}, handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, handle_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, alarm_no, vehicle_id, vehicle_plate, task_id, alarm_type, alarm_level, alarm_content, longitude, latitude, status, handle_method, handle_remark, handler_id, handler_name, alarm_time, handle_time, create_time, update_time FROM alarm WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alarm
AND status = #{status}

SELECT id, alarm_no, vehicle_id, vehicle_plate, task_id, alarm_type, alarm_level, alarm_content, longitude, latitude, status, handle_method, handle_remark, handler_id, handler_name, alarm_time, handle_time, create_time, update_time FROM alarm WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND alarm_type = #{alarmType} ORDER BY alarm_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT alarm_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM alarm GROUP BY alarm_type
SELECT alarm_level AS level, COUNT(*) AS count FROM alarm GROUP BY alarm_level
